violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. At the time of inspection, Chlorine/bleach sanitizer was set up as a replacement until new bottle of quaternary ammonium can be acquired (Half sink of water with 2 caps of bleach). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Several screws were observed missing from holes intended for screws in the backroom 2-door reach-in freezer, with a screw observed on the floor of the unit. 2 Door Freezer is to be fixed/repaired to ensure all pieces are securely fastened for proper design of the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
The floor sealed coating was observed to be rough/textured and is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Floor is to be properly sealed/coated to be smooth. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
